original_statement: who was the last contestant to be eliminated?
mutated_statement: who was the last participant to be eliminated yet still competing?
mutation_analysis: 词汇替换 + 语义矛盾新增: "contestant" 替换为 "participant"（同义/泛化） | 新增短语 "yet still competing" 导致与 "to be eliminated" 的语义冲突（被淘汰→仍在竞赛中） (contestant→participant | to be eliminated→to be eliminated yet still competing)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 — 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述（“Row 14 shows Melisa Popanicić as the '2nd eliminated in episode 10,' making her the last participant to be eliminated while still competing. ”及“as opposed to quitting or finishing as runner-up/winner”），可识别出agent已注意到“被淘汰”与“仍在竞赛中”表面矛盾。agent通过查询（simple_query）并给出具体事实（第10集第二个被淘汰者为Melisa Popanicić），在语义层面将矛盾合理化：把“yet still competing”解释为“被正式淘汰（非主动退赛或决赛名次）时仍在比赛状态”，从而提供了符合该解释的答案。该行为属于识别矛盾后用逻辑/语境解释使问题成立，而非拒绝或直接修正问题，因而归入“逻辑解释合理化”。
